title: Segfault due to LEFT JOIN flattening optimization
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c Int32, a String, b Float64);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT 1 AS a) AS s LEFT JOIN (SELECT b, * FROM t1) AS x;
CREATE TABLE t2(d Int32, e String DEFAULT 'default');
SELECT * FROM (SELECT 111) AS s LEFT JOIN (SELECT d + 222 AS d FROM t2) AS x GROUP BY a;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN flattening optimization causing segfault
